resources.string: This action is irreversible. Please wait %1$d seconds and type DELETE below to confirm.
Your account has been deleted. Redirecting...
By proceeding, you agree that your account and all associated data will be permanently removed. This action is irreversible.\n\nPlease wait %1$d seconds to continue.
Please type \'DELETE\' below to confirm your decision.
Agreement accepted. You can now proceed.
